heading.description: Cycle stage label mapped to GyMLCyclicItem.label by the current validator path.

description.description: Cycle stage description mapped to GyMLCyclicItem.description.
description.example: Learners notice the result and prepare evidence for the next step.

icon_name.description: Optional Remix Icon class mapped to GyMLCyclicItem.icon.

items.heading: Observe
items.description: Learners notice the result and prepare evidence for the next step.

items.heading: Adjust

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Items are routed to GyMLCyclicItem by the current validator path.
Use heading, description, and optional icon_name only.
